item.title: ISC Stormcast For Friday, August 8th, 2025 https://isc.sans.edu/podcastdetail/9562, (Fri, Aug 8th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green

item.title: New Infection Chain and ConfuserEx-Based Obfuscation for DarkCloud Stealer
item.author: Pranay Kumar Chhaparwal, Benjamin Chang and Lee Wei Yeong
item.content:encoded: DarkCloud Stealer's delivery has shifted. We explore three different attack chains that use ConfuserEx obfuscation and a final payload in Visual Basic 6.

item.title: ISC Stormcast For Thursday, August 7th, 2025 https://isc.sans.edu/podcastdetail/9560, (Thu, Aug 7th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green

item.title: Mass Internet Scanning from ASN 43350 [Guest Diary], (Thu, Aug 7th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green
item.content:encoded: [This is a Guest Diary by Duncan Woosley, an ISC intern as part of the SANS.edu BACS program]
